name: Deviled Eggs and Noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare Deviled Eggs according to Recipe 19.
2. Mix onion and margarine in a 1-quart casserole dish. Microwave on high until the onion is tender, about 1½ to 2 minutes.
3. Stir in sour cream, Parmesan cheese, milk, poppy seeds, and salt. Microwave until heated through, 5 to 6 minutes.
4. Arrange eggs over noodles. Microwave until eggs are hot, 1 to 2 minutes.
